creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Adriaan de Groot from comment #0)

Adriaan, Could you please attach a full build log of the failure, and provide details on the exact port versions of python 2.7 and libressl. 

With python, the failure of certain modules is not fatal, but causes the packaging list to change. The actual compilation error is further up in the build log.

There is also an upstream bug [1] which solved an issue in multiple Python branches to support libressl 2.7, so it would be interesting to see why/how this issue is failing exactly.

[1] https://bugs.python.org/issue33127
